formal_proof_artifacts.role: geometric tail sum formula — certifies that the K-tail and N-tail extrapolation formulas used in the Schwinger delta certificate are mathematically exact
N-limit convergence — certifies that the N→∞ limit of the Schwinger interaction delta exists

h_gj.name: h_gj
h_gj.meaning: Glimm-Jaffe ground-state convergence for phi^4_2 Hamiltonian truncation

theorem_content.abstract: The Schwinger interaction delta certificate uses the geometric tail formula (proved: geometric_tail_bound) and the N-limit convergence (proved conditionally: n_limit_schwinger_free_subtracted_mass_tuned_joint_removal). The certificate's tail extrapolation arithmetic is machine-verified.
theorem_content.physical_meaning: The Schwinger interaction delta = <Omega_K,N, (H_int - E_vac) Omega_K,N> at finite K,N. Its K-tail is bounded by a geometric series (proved), and the N-limit exists (proved conditionally). The certificate honestly reports that the current finite computation (K≤3, N≤3) does not yet certify the infinite-volume delta to the required precision.
theorem_content.honest_failure: status=failed_to_certify means the finite K,N computation is not yet precise enough. The analytic certificate does not claim this precision — it certifies the mathematical soundness of the tail extrapolation method.
